description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a black, slightly concave deck with a subtle wood-colored edge visible along the sides. The deck is equipped with black grip tape on top, which appears to have a uniform, grippy texture and no visible graphics or cut-outs. The skateboard is supported by two sets of black wheels attached to metallic trucks, which are mounted underneath the deck. The wheels are classic street style, small and hard, suitable for tricks and urban riding. The trucks are standard in shape and color, with no visible branding or unique features. There are no visible brand logos or deck graphics, giving the skateboard a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black, grippy deck, classic black wheels, and standard metallic trucks. The deck is plain with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, the concave deck, and the black wheels beneath.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose of the deck, the grip tape surface, and the alignment of the wheels and trucks.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the skateboard's length and wheel placement.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail of the deck, grip tape, and the rear wheels and trucks alignment.
attribute_wheel_type: street, black, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard metallic, standard kingpin, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern, graphics, or text
